heading: Omitted
label: 1300g–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which redesignated the Tiwa Indians of Ysleta, Texas, as the Ysleta del Sur Pueblo, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 100–89, title I, § 102101 Stat. 666Aug. 18, 1987
